description: DFT/TDDFT Authoritative Knowledge Base + Materials Project VASP DFT Reference — Dirac Solver (restructured 2026-04-16, H2O GS provenance fixed)
quality_policy: Strict provenance: A-ready requires verifiable URL+values; B-tier requires source but values need cross-check; C-draft is blocked for strict use.
correction_summary: Complete restructure. Re-extracted raw HTML from Octopus Tutorial 16. Corrected: N atom data declared as eV (UnitsOutput=eV_Angstrom in official inp); CH4 data is eV (UnitsOutput=eV_Angstrom). H2O GS provenance VERIFIED (2026-04-16): -76.4389 Ha from CCSD(T)-R12/CBS (Helgaker 1997, DOI 10.1063/1.474518). H2O GS upgraded from C-draft to A-ready. Added H atom (NIST CODATA + Octopus formula PP), H2, TDDFT metrics, and H2O derivation docs. Created missing metadata files (pdf_sources_index.md, pdf_download_status.json). Total 11 documents.

sources.title: N Atom Ground-State Reference (Verified — Octopus Tutorial 16)

provenance.unit_note: CONFIRMED IN eV via NIST SRD 141 cross-validation. Octopus 2s eigenvalue (-18.28 eV = -0.672 Ha) matches NIST LDA -0.676 Ha within 0.6%. Octopus 2p eigenvalue (-7.30 eV = -0.268 Ha) matches NIST LDA -0.266 Ha within 0.7%. Total energy -262 eV ≈ -9.6 Ha consistent with 5-valence-electron PP picture.

reference_values.nist_reference: NIST SRD 141 - Kotochigova et al. Phys. Rev. A 55, 191 (1997)

sources.title: H Atom Ground-State Reference (NIST CODATA + Octopus Formula PP)

provenance.unit_note: CODATA: exact -0.5 Ha. Octopus formula PP: total_energy=+0.5811 Ha (positive — model artifact)

provenance.verification_needed: Specific tutorial page for H2O optical absorption not confirmed

provenance.doi_corrected_from_error: 10.1063/1.445869 was incorrectly cited (wrong paper — water potential functions); corrected to Helgaker 1997 CCSD(T)-R12 benchmark

reference_values.primary_citation: Helgaker et al., J. Chem. Phys. 106, 9639 (1997)
supporting_citations: Gurtubay et al., J. Chem. Phys. 127 (2007) — arXiv:0709.4351
Tschū-Collón et al., J. Chem. Phys. 161 (2024) — arXiv:2403.00649
reference_values.notes: Nonrelativistic, Born-Oppenheimer, static nuclei. Relativistic corrections (~-0.003 to -0.005 Ha) not included. Zero-point energy not included. This is the TARGET for the calculation phase.
